title: Design Document - Component Refactoring
response:
Feedback Summary (1 comments):

Specific Text Comments:
1. "│   ├── ui/              # Reusable UI primitives ...": `ui/` folder is used for storing the ShardCN components. Please use another folder (eg. `frontend/src/components/common/`) to store the shared components.

Also, group the components into individual folders by component type. For example, `file-type-icon.tsx` should be placed into a folder `/components/common/icons/`.

comments.comment:
`ui/` folder is used for storing the ShardCN components. Please use another folder (eg. `frontend/src/components/common/`) to store the shared components.

Also, group the components into individual folders by component type. For example, `file-type-icon.tsx` should be placed into a folder `/components/common/icons/`.
